The Problem
The current reality
Sarah asks ChatGPT.
Feels like she's covered.
💬 Asks ChatGPT about Competitor X Mon 9:05 AM
Got a confident 3-paragraph answer — training data from 6 months ago
🔍 Manually checks their pricing page 9:20 AM
Did this change? Hard to tell without a reference point
📰 Googles competitor name + "news" 9:35 AM — gives up
Found one press release from 3 weeks ago. Missed everything else.
⚠ ChatGPT gives a snapshot from months ago — no monitoring, no change detection, no pattern across competitors
False confidence. Missing real moves. Reacting after the fact.
→
With IndustryLens
Same Sarah.
Same Monday.
📧 Weekly digest lands automatically 9:00 AM — inbox
3 strategic recommendations. Already prioritised.
🔗 Cross-competitor pattern flagged 9:15 AM
All 3 competitors pushing AI messaging this week — coordinated shift
⚡ Competitor changed pricing 4 days ago 9:25 AM
Diff detected. Exact change shown. Recommendation attached.
✅ Exports battlecard for leadership 9:40 AM — done
"Here's what changed this week and what we should do about it."
40 minutes. Real changes. Patterns detected. Leadership has a plan.

Features
Key Features

Intelligence, Not Just Information

Every feature is included in every plan. No feature gating, no hidden upgrades.

AI Battlecards

Auto-generated competitor profiles with strengths, weaknesses, and actions. Updated weekly.

Insight Categorisation

Ad campaigns, pricing, product updates, partnerships, events, market expansion and more.

Weekly Email Briefing

Curated digest delivered every Monday. Stay informed without logging into any dashboard.

Cross-Competitor Insights

Spot patterns when multiple competitors converge on the same strategy or market move.

Activity Timeline

Chronological feed of every competitor move — filterable by type, competitor, and date.

Raw Data Library

Browse actual ads, posts, reviews, and changes. Full evidence behind every insight.

Role-Specific Views

Marketing, Product, and Sales each see what’s relevant to their function.

PDF Reports

Exportable weekly digest, battlecard export, activity timeline, and competitor matrix.

Strategic Recommendations

Every insight includes a suggested action. Move from “what happened” to “what to do next.”

Ad Intelligence
Paid Advertising Tracked Across Google, Meta & LinkedIn

Know Every Ad Your Competitors Are Running

Track ad creative, messaging, targeting signals, geo-focus, and spend patterns — so you know exactly who they’re going after and how.

Ads Tracked

Ad Platforms

New Creatives

Automatically captured as soon as competitors launch new campaigns.

Ad Creative & Copy

See the exact headlines, images, and CTAs competitors are testing — and what’s running longest.

Geographic Targeting

Understand which markets competitors are investing in and where they’re scaling back.

Competitor Keyword Targeting

Spot when rivals bid on your brand name, your customers’ alternatives, or your category terms.

Messaging Shifts

AI flags when a competitor pivots their positioning — new audience, new value prop, new angle.
